description: Product description Material: 100% steel. Heavy duty Securit branded hasp and staple. Ideal for a range of out builds such as garden sheds, garages and gates for example. Adds great and reliable security. No fittings included. Length: 19cm. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
